title: PersonaSpec
description: Agent capability specification. Compiled by larva from YAML persona definitions into canonical JSON.

base.description: Parent persona for inheritance. Resolved recursively by larva.

system_prompt.description: Fully resolved system prompt after template expansion and inheritance merge

tools_profile.description: tela profile name. Determines which MCP tools this agent can access.

node.description: Target execution node. Used by nervus for dispatch routing.

scratchpad_ref.description: Logical scratchpad reference (not a filesystem path). Resolved by anima at runtime.

budget.description: Token budget limit. Enforced by anima runtime.

can_spawn.description: Spawn permission. false = forbidden, true = any persona, list of strings = only named personas allowed.

spec_id.description: Stable identifier. Survives prompt edits; changes only on structural mutation.

spec_digest.description: SHA-256 of canonical (sorted-key, no-whitespace) JSON output

spec_version.description: Schema version (semver). All consumers must reject unknown versions.
